subcodes.first_line: O thou who believest in the Words of God! Though it is dawn, myriad cares, troubles, tasks, hardships and tribulations beset me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بکلمات الله صبح است و صد هزار گرفتاری و متاعب و امور و مصاعب و مصائب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity
